name: dns-beats-db-when-both-signals-present
description: Ranking stress: a 'no such host' AND a generic connection error — DNS must win over a plain DB-down reading.

name: oom-with-image-pull-noise-still-oom
description: Ranking stress: an old ImagePull event lingers, but the container was OOMKilled — OOM (terminated state) must outrank a stale waiting-reason.

description: Pending for an unbound PVC must not be misread as insufficient CPU.

name: transient-restart-not-yet-a-signature
description: NEGATIVE-ish: a single restart on a now-Running pod with healthy logs should not trigger a confident crashloop verdict.
